base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of items_torches — a pickup_item (health_pickup) from 1988 ninja gaiden. Torch containers + drops — Windmill/Fire/Jump/Vacuum/Invincible ninpo scrolls + Small/Large HP + Spiritual Strength + Time-freeze orb. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
